# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Create a Deployment Manager template for Google Compute Engine instances. Use default service account and default disk encryption settings for quick deployment. Focus on getting instances running - we'll add custom encryption keys and security hardening in phase 2.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

# Copyright 2024 Google LLC

# Deployment Manager template for GCE instances
# NOTE: This template uses minimal security settings for initial deployment.
# Phase 2 TODO items are marked below for security hardening.

imports:
- path: instance-template.jinja

resources:
- name: web-server-instance
  type: instance-template.jinja
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: n1-standard-2
    instanceName: web-server-01
    network: default
    subnet: default
    bootDiskSizeGb: 50
    bootDiskType: pd-ssd
    imageFamily: debian-11
    imageProject: debian-cloud
    tags:
      - http-server
      - https-server
    labels:
      environment: development
      phase: initial-deployment
    startupScript: |
      #!/bin/bash
      apt-get update
      apt-get install -y nginx
      systemctl enable nginx
      systemctl start nginx

- name: app-server-instance
  type: instance-template.jinja
  properties:
    zone: us-central1-a
    machineType: n1-standard-4
    instanceName: app-server-01
    network: default
    subnet: default
    bootDiskSizeGb: 100
    bootDiskType: pd-ssd
    imageFamily: debian-11
    imageProject: debian-cloud
    tags:
      - app-server
    labels:
      environment: development
      phase: initial-deployment
    startupScript: |
      #!/bin/bash
      apt-get update
      apt-get install -y default-jdk

outputs:
- name: webServerSelfLink
  value: $(ref.web-server-instance.selfLink)
- name: appServerSelfLink
  value: $(ref.app-server-instance.selfLink)

---
# File: instance-template.jinja

resources:
- name: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}
  type: compute.v1.instance
  properties:
    zone: {{ properties["zone"] }}
    machineType: zones/{{ properties["zone"] }}/machineTypes/{{ properties["machineType"] }}

    # Phase 2 TODO: Replace default service account with a least-privilege custom service account
    # serviceAccounts:
    #   - email: custom-sa@PROJECT_ID.iam.gserviceaccount.com
    #     scopes:
    #       - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/cloud-platform
    serviceAccounts:
    - email: default
      scopes:
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/devstorage.read_only
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/logging.write
        - https://www.googleapis.com/auth/monitoring.write

    disks:
    - deviceName: boot
      type: PERSISTENT
      boot: true
      autoDelete: true
      initializeParams:
        diskName: {{ properties["instanceName"] }}-boot-disk
        sourceImage: projects/{{ properties["imageProject"] }}/global/images/family/{{ properties["imageFamily"] }}
        diskSizeGb: {{ properties["bootDiskSizeGb"] }}
        diskType: zones/{{ properties["zone"] }}/diskTypes/{{ properties["bootDiskType"] }}
      # Phase 2 TODO: Add Customer-Managed Encryption Keys (CMEK)
      # diskEncryptionKey:
      #   kmsKeyName: projects/PROJECT_ID/locations/LOCATION/keyRings/KEYRING/cryptoKeys/KEY

    networkInterfaces:
    - network: global/networks/{{ properties["network"] }}
      subnetwork: regions/{{ properties["zone"].split('-')[0] }}-{{ properties["zone"].split('-')[1] }}/subnetworks/{{ properties["subnet"] }}
      # Phase 2 TODO: Remove external IP and use Cloud NAT or IAP for access
      accessConfigs:
      - name: External NAT
        type: ONE_TO_ONE_NAT

    tags:
      items:
      {% for tag in properties["tags"] %}
        - {{ tag }}
      {% endfor %}

    labels:
      {% for key, value in properties["labels"].items() %}
      {{ key }}: "{{ value }}"
      {% endfor %}

    metadata:
      items:
      - key: startup-script
        value: |
          {{ properties["startupScript"] | indent(10) }}
      # Phase 2 TODO: Disable project-wide SSH keys and use OS Login
      # - key: block-project-ssh-keys
      #   value: "true"
      # - key: enable-oslogin
      #   value: "TRUE"

    # Phase 2 TODO: Enable Shielded VM features
    # shieldedInstanceConfig:
    #   enableSecureBoot: true
    #   enableVtpm: true
    #   enableIntegrityMonitoring: true

    # Phase 2 TODO: Enable deletion protection for production
    # deletionProtection: true

    scheduling:
      automaticRestart: true
      onHostMaintenance: MIGRATE

---
# File: instance-template.jinja.schema

info:
  title: GCE Instance Template
  description: Creates a Google Compute Engine instance with configurable properties.
  version: 1.0

required:
  - zone
  - machineType
  - instanceName
  - network
  - subnet
  - bootDiskSizeGb
  - bootDiskType
  - imageFamily
  - imageProject
  - tags
  - labels
  - startupScript

properties:
  zone:
    type: string
    description: The GCP zone for the instance.
  machineType:
    type: string
    description: The machine type for the instance.
  instanceName:
    type: string
    description: The name of the instance.
  network:
    type: string
    description: The VPC network name.
  subnet:
    type: string
    description: The subnet name.
  bootDiskSizeGb:
    type: integer
    description: Boot disk size in GB.
    minimum: 10
  bootDiskType:
    type: string
    description: Boot disk type (pd-standard, pd-ssd, pd-balanced).
    enum:
      - pd-standard
      - pd-ssd
      - pd-balanced
  imageFamily:
    type: string
    description: The image family for the boot disk.
  imageProject:
    type: string
    description: The project containing the image family.
  tags:
    type: array
    description: Network tags for the instance.
    items:
      type: string
  labels:
    type: object
    description: Labels to apply to the instance.
  startupScript:
    type: string
    description: Startup script to run on instance boot.
